allow: Bash(grep -n "^  [a-z]*: {$\\|^  fr: {$\\|^  en: {$\\|^  es: {$\\|^  pt: {$\\|^  de: {$\\|^  it: {$\\|^  tr: {$\\|^const COPY" app/contact/ContactClient.tsx)

PowerShell(Get-Content "C:\\Users\\ilyee\\Fanovera\\Google\\ACC01_2026-03-10_Instagram.csv.csv" -Encoding Unicode | Where-Object { $_ -match "^\\S" -and $_ -notmatch "^\(Untitled|All time|Search term\)" } | ForEach-Object { $f = $_ -split "`t"; if \([int]\($f[6] -replace ",","."\) -gt 0 -or \([double]\($f[5] -replace ",","."\) -gt 0\)\) { "$\($f[0]\)`t$\($f[2]\)imp`t$\($f[3]\)clk`t$\($f[5]\)€`t$\($f[6]\)conv" } } | Select-Object -First 80)

PowerShell(Get-Content "C:\\Users\\ilyee\\Fanovera\\Google\\Rapport sur les termes de recherche \(15\).csv" -Encoding Unicode | Select-Object -Skip 3 | ForEach-Object { $a = $_ -split "`t"; if \($a.Count -ge 17\) { $conv = [double]\($a[15] -replace ",","."\); $cost = [double]\($a[12] -replace ",","."\); $clicks = [int]\($a[8] -replace " ",""\); if \($conv -gt 0\) { "$conv conv | $cost€ | $clicks clk | [$\($a[3]\)] | $\($a[0]\)" } } } | Sort-Object -Descending | Select-Object -First 100)

PowerShell(Get-Content "C:\\Users\\ilyee\\Fanovera\\Google\\Rapport sur les termes de recherche \(15\).csv" -Encoding Unicode | Select-Object -Skip 3 | ForEach-Object { $a = $_ -split "`t"; if \($a.Count -ge 17\) { $conv = [double]\(\($a[15] -replace '[","]',''\) -replace ' ',''\); $cost = [double]\(\($a[12] -replace '[","]',''\) -replace ' ',''\); $clicks = [int]\($a[8] -replace " ",""\); if \($conv -gt 0\) { "$conv|$cost|$clicks|$\($a[3]\)|$\($a[0]\)" } } } 2>$null | Sort-Object { [double]\(\($_ -split '\\|'\)[0]\) } -Descending | Select-Object -First 80)

PowerShell(Get-Content "C:\\Users\\ilyee\\Fanovera\\Google\\Rapport sur les termes de recherche \(15\).csv" -Encoding Unicode | Select-Object -Skip 3 -First 5 | ForEach-Object { $a = $_ -split "`t"; "COLS=$\($a.Count\)`nTERM=$\($a[0]\)`nCAMP=$\($a[3]\)`nCLICKS=$\($a[8]\)`nCOST=$\($a[12]\)`nCONVRATE=$\($a[14]\)`nCONV=$\($a[15]\)`nCOSTCONV=$\($a[16]\)`n---" })

PowerShell($result = @\(\); Get-Content "C:\\Users\\ilyee\\Fanovera\\Google\\Rapport sur les termes de recherche \(15\).csv" -Encoding Unicode | Select-Object -Skip 3 | ForEach-Object { $a = $_ -split "`t"; if \($a.Count -ge 17 -and $a[0] -notmatch "^Total|^--$"\) { $convStr = $a[15].Trim\('"'\) -replace ",","."; $costStr = $a[12].Trim\('"'\) -replace ",","."; try { $conv = [double]$convStr; $cost = [double]$costStr; $clicks = [int]\($a[8] -replace " ",""\); if \($conv -gt 0\) { $result += [PSCustomObject]@{Conv=$conv;Cost=$cost;Clicks=$clicks;Camp=$a[3];Term=$a[0];CPA=if\($conv -gt 0\){[math]::Round\($cost/$conv,2\)}else{0}} } } catch {} } } 2>$null; $result | Sort-Object Conv -Descending | Select-Object -First 80 | Format-Table -AutoSize)
Bash(cp 'docs/docs-2/Rapport sur les mots clés pour le Réseau de Recherche \(18\).csv' '/tmp/kw.csv')
Bash(cp 'docs/docs-2/Rapport sur les termes de recherche \(22\).csv' '/tmp/terms.csv')
Bash(grep -n '^const commonAscii\\|^  en: \\[$\\|^  de: \\[$\\|^  it: \\[$\\|^};' app/i18n/dictionaries.ts)

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Path . -Force -File | Where-Object { $_.Name -match 'vercel|\\.env|netlify|railway|fly' } | Select-Object Name; Write-Output "---packagescripts---"; if \(Test-Path package.json\) { \(Get-Content package.json -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json\).scripts | ConvertTo-Json })

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Path . -Force -File | Where-Object { $_.Name -match 'next\\.config|middleware' } | Select-Object Name; if \(Test-Path next.config.js\) { Get-Content next.config.js -Raw }; if \(Test-Path next.config.mjs\) { Get-Content next.config.mjs -Raw }; if \(Test-Path next.config.ts\) { Get-Content next.config.ts -Raw })

PowerShell($gas = Test-Path ".\\node_modules\\google-ads-api"; $envf = Test-Path ".\\.env.local"; "google-ads-api installed: $gas"; "env.local present: $envf"; if \($envf\) { $keys = Get-Content ".\\.env.local" | ForEach-Object { if \($_ -match "="\) { \($_ -split "=",2\)[0].Trim\(\) } }; "Has DATABASE_URL: $\($keys -contains 'DATABASE_URL'\)"; "Has GOOGLE_ADS_CUSTOMER_ID: $\($keys -contains 'GOOGLE_ADS_CUSTOMER_ID'\)"; "Has GOOGLE_ADS_REFRESH_TOKEN: $\($keys -contains 'GOOGLE_ADS_REFRESH_TOKEN'\)" })

PowerShell(node -e "import\('@neondatabase/serverless'\).then\(async \({neon}\)=>{const fs=await import\('node:fs'\);const env=Object.fromEntries\(fs.readFileSync\('.env.local','utf8'\).split\('\\n'\).filter\(l=>l&&!l.startsWith\('#'\)&&l.includes\('='\)\).map\(l=>{const i=l.indexOf\('='\);return [l.slice\(0,i\).trim\(\),l.slice\(i+1\).trim\(\)]}\)\);const sql=neon\(env.DATABASE_URL\);const t=await sql`SELECT to_regclass\('public.ad_costs_by_keyword'\) AS tbl`;const c=await sql`SELECT column_name FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name='checkout_payloads' AND column_name IN \('keyword','match_type'\) ORDER BY column_name`;console.log\('ad_costs_by_keyword:',t[0].tbl\);console.log\('checkout_payloads new cols:',c.map\(r=>r.column_name\).join\(', '\)||'\(none\)'\);}\)")

PowerShell(npx next lint --file app/lib/usePricingExperiment.ts --file app/twitter/TwitterPageClient.tsx --file app/twitter/components/Step2Username.tsx --file app/api/twitter/tweet/route.ts 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 30)

PowerShell($pids = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3137,3138 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique; foreach\($p in $pids\){ try { Stop-Process -Id $p -Force -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Output "killed $p" } catch {} }; Write-Output "done")
